response: This code performs matrix multiplication between two matrices `A` (of size `m x n`) and `B` (of size `n x p`) using the standard **triple-nested loop algorithm**, where each element of the resulting matrix `result` (of size `m x p`) is computed as the dot product of the corresponding row from `A` and column from `B`. The algorithm follows the definition of matrix multiplication with a time complexity of **O(m·n·p)**.
